structured_content.text: This Thursday, December 5, at 4:00 p.m. ET, Puck’s media ace Dylan Byers will join the Inner Circle for an off-the-record conversation about the latest convulsions and plotlines roiling the media landscape. In particular, Dylan will reveal how media executives are interpreting Brian Roberts’ ambitious plan to spin off Comcast’s declining cable channels—and the attendant anxieties that are now rippling through 30 Rock.

Puck’s Inner Circle Call Dear Reader, This Thursday, December 5, at 4:00 p.m. ET , Puck’s media ace Dylan Byers will join the Inner Circle for an off-the-record conversation about the latest convulsions and plotlines roiling the media landscape. In particular, Dylan will reveal how media executives are interpreting Brian Roberts ’ ambitious plan to spin off Comcast’s declining cable channels—and the attendant anxieties that are now rippling through 30 Rock. These exclusive calls are reserved for Puck’s Inner Circle, our highest tier of membership, which offers access to special events, new product features, and off-the-record discussions like this one. If you don’t want to miss out on these exclusive conversations with our world-class journalists, upgrade to our Inner Circle tier before tomorrow; you’ll receive an invitation to the call with Dylan, plus access to all future calls and Inner Circle events . Click the link below, or go to My Account > Billing > Update Plan and select Inner Circle . Upon selection, your card on file will be charged for the upgrade, and you’ll immediately become a member of our Inner Circle for the remainder of your subscription. See you on the inside. Fritz UPGRADE TODAY You received this message because you signed up to receive emails from Puck. Was this email forwarded to you? Sign up for Puck here Sent to puck@khamel.com unsubscribe Interested in exploring our newsletter offerings?
